name: release-expansion-world
description: Release world matrix for the dense depth course, boundaries, rank board, NPC landmarks, premium stands, Honor plaza, and sanitized assets.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local r=workspace.PunchWallRPG local blocks=r:FindFirstChild('Depth Blocks') local total,collidable,cubes=0,0,0 for _,b in ipairs(blocks:GetChildren()) do total+=1 if b.CanCollide then collidable+=1 end if math.abs(b.Size.X-b.Size.Y)<.01 and math.abs(b.Size.Y-b.Size.Z)<.01 then cubes+=1 end end local bounds=true for _,n in ipairs({'Forest Hub West Ridge','Forest Hub East Ridge','Forest Hub South Ridge','Forest Hub North West Ridge','Forest Hub North East Ridge'}) do local p=r:FindFirstChild(n) bounds=bounds and p~=nil and p.CanCollide end return H:JSONEncode({ok=total==5400 and collidable==5400 and cubes==5400 and bounds,total=total,collidable=collidable,cubes=cubes,bounds=bounds})

steps.label: tall dense cube course and hub boundaries

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local r=workspace.PunchWallRPG local interact=r.Interactables local premium,honor=0,0 for _,x in ipairs(interact:GetChildren()) do if x:GetAttribute('PremiumOnly') then premium+=1 end if x.Name:find('Honor Stand') then honor+=1 end end local names={} for _,d in ipairs(r:GetDescendants()) do names[d.Name]=true end return H:JSONEncode({ok=names['Creator Store Hero Power Bag'] or names['Heavy Punch Bag Shell'],armory=names['Hero Armory Merchant NPC'] or names['Hero Armory Merchant NPC Fallback'],pets=names['Hero Sidekick Scientist NPC'] or names['Hero Sidekick Scientist NPC Fallback'],rank=names['World 1 Hero Rank Board']==true,honorNpc=names['Honor Keeper NPC']==true,premium=premium,honorStands=honor,noFuturePortal=not names['Future World Portal']})

steps.label: landmarks shops rank and compact map exist

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local unsafe=0 local rs=game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage') for _,folderName in ipairs({'PunchWallExternalAssets','PunchWallFistAssets','PunchWallVisualAssets'}) do local f=rs:FindFirstChild(folderName) if f then for _,d in ipairs(f:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA('LuaSourceContainer') or d:IsA('Tool') or d:IsA('RemoteEvent') or d:IsA('RemoteFunction') or d:IsA('ClickDetector') or d:IsA('ProximityPrompt') then unsafe+=1 end end end end return H:JSONEncode({ok=unsafe==0,unsafe=unsafe,resetInterval=300,resetAt=workspace.PunchWallRPG:GetAttribute('WorldResetAt')})

steps.label: visual assets are sanitized and reset timer is armed
